nodes.content:
🏆 Fast-Track VIP Program

We see you're a serious investor. Let's move quickly.

What's your priority?
• Speed (close in 2 weeks)?
• Both villas (buy together)?
• Finance structuring?
• Direct CEO conversation?

We can accommodate VIP investors differently.

🎯 VIP Options:

1. FAST-CLOSE: 2-week turnaround
   • Skip standard review
   • Direct to legal
   • Dedicated account manager
   • White-glove service

2. DUAL VILLA: Better terms
   • Buy both villas
   • Combined PHP 56M
   • Bulk discount: PHP 800K
   • Shared management savings: PHP 50K/year
   • PHP 790K combined monthly income

3. CEO CALL: Direct relationship
   • Founder discussion
   • Custom terms possible
   • Strategic advisory included
   • Beyond standard package

Which interests you?

💼 Dual Villa Investment:

Combined Investment: PHP 56M
Discount: -PHP 800K → PHP 55.2M effective
Combined Monthly: PHP 790K
Combined Annual: PHP 9.48M
ROI: Same 17-25%

Financing:
• PHP 38.64M (70% dual)
• Down payment: PHP 16.56M (30%) instead of 16.8M
• Single loan application (faster)
• Shared management (one fee)

Management: PHP 39.5K/month (vs PHP 79K separate)

Want to see the combined prospectus?

📞 VIP Call Scheduling:

I'm connecting you with our founder, Alex.

Best time this week?
• Today after 6pm?
• Tomorrow 10am or 2pm?
• Wednesday?
• Thursday morning?

Prefer video or voice?
